description_long: This is a modern, single-story suburban house with a flat roof and a rectangular footprint. The front facade features two garages, each with a driveway, and a small landscaped area with shrubs and flowers. The rear of the house opens to a spacious backyard with a large tree, a grassy lawn, and a small patio or deck area, as well as a pool. The side views reveal a row of tall bushes or trees providing privacy along one boundary, and the house is surrounded by a low white perimeter wall. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color with large windows arranged in a regular pattern. Two cars are parked in the driveways, one red and one white, adding to the residential character.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, two garages, landscaped front, and a spacious backyard with a pool and privacy trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing two garages, driveways, landscaped entry, and parked cars.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the row of privacy trees, grassy backyard, and the length of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, large central tree, patio area, and pool.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the pool, privacy trees, and both driveways with cars.
attribute_entryway_design: Double garage entry with paved driveways, small landscaped area, and a simple main door without porch or columns.
